TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciripunan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,924 buwan, 7,823 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 1,023 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 6,800 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 鄰里未確定. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciripunan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciripunan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciripunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciripunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciripunan hya' ga Sirakesay. tay 'llaw na Ciripunan hya' ga Buner. tay 'zil na Ciripunan hya' ga Ciyibangcalay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiripunan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, *****. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕirakes~ɕaj. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa βuner. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciripunan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,924 buwan, 7,823 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 13% kyan ku 1,023 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 87% kyan ku 6,800 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, 鄰里未確定. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciripunan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Ciripunan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Ciripunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciripunan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Ciripunan hya' ga Sirakesay. tay 'llaw na Ciripunan hya' ga Buner. tay 'zil na Ciripunan hya' ga Ciyibangcalay. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiripunan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, *****. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕirakes~ɕaj. taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa βuner. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiripunan ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨijiβaŋʦ~ʨalaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
